title: 'Silenced, Not Defeated': Raghav Chadha Breaks Silence Over Rajya Sabha Snub, Asks AAP If Raising Public Issues A Crime?
description: Chadha through the video asserted that throughout his tenure in Parliament, he has consistently prioritised public issues, often addressing unconventional topics that rarely receive floor time. He questioned whether advocating for the common man had been deemed a "crime" or a 'mistake' by his party.
